message:
fix(robot): correct docs wording and support-bundle privacy hint flag

- docs: describe --robot-docs as "topic-scoped JSON documentation"
  instead of "human-readable documentation" to match actual output format
- support_bundle: privacy suppression hint now references --allow-secret
  instead of the stale --allow-persist flag
- tests: verify quickstart Discovery section wording and support bundle
  privacy suppression file contents

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -283,7 +283,7 @@ Session: %s
 Privacy Mode: enabled
 Time: %s
 
-To include private content, use: ntm --robot-support-bundle=%s --allow-persist
+To include private content, use: ntm --robot-support-bundle=%s --allow-secret
 `, session, time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339), session)
 		gen.AddFile(
 			fmt.Sprintf("sessions/%s/PRIVACY_SUPPRESSED.txt", session),
